## Description

<!-- Describe your changes in detail. What problem does this solve? What feature does it add? -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition/update

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues using "Closes #123" or "Fixes #123" format -->

Closes #

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] All existing tests pass

### Test Details

```bash
# Commands used to test
./gradlew :module-name:test
```

## Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are checked before marking PR as ready for review -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added Javadoc for new public APIs
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked my code for potential bugs
- [ ] I have rebased on the latest main branch
- [ ] My commit messages follow conventional commit format
